name: KKHTA Sanae Kochiya

Requested by... SOMEONE UNKNOWN! (my friend)

Sanae, from the Touhou series. Except she is insane, because KKHTA! Enjoy.

Scenario: You've been crucified by Sanae. You're (presumably) a youkai.
